subject: Re: OWL ping — Cycle 1 & 2 (01:39Z)
body:
OWL — Got both your Cycle 1 and Cycle 2 pings. Thanks for checking in.

Status unchanged on my end:
- Fleet monitoring: 14 apps UP, 2 DOWN (Contractor Pro & Gym Forge — still blocked on Railway CLI OAuth)
- FloodClaims Phase 4: Code complete on my side, waiting on Railway auth resolution to deploy
- Priority question (Option B first, then C): Noted and agreed. Standing by for Jay's go-ahead.

No new messages from Jay yet. Will ping you immediately when I have updates.

— Bull
